title: Love Is a Warm Blaster
content:
{{Top|rwm}}
{{Canceled|short stories}}
"'''Love Is a Warm Blaster'''" was a short story written by [[Paul Danner]] and illustrated by [[Talon Dunning]]. Set during [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] tenure as [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]], it was made for ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', but was later released to the Star Wars Fanboy Association.<ref name="SWFA">{{WebCite|url=http://www.myuselessknowledge.com/swfa/loveis.html|text=Love Is A Warm Blaster|author=Danner, Paul|work=[http://www.myuselessknowledge.com/swfa Star Wars Fanboy Association]|archivedate=20190812065813}}</ref>
